name: Melt in Your Mouth Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the flour, baking powder, sugar, cream of tartar, and salt.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Make a well in the center of the mixture and add the milk all at once.
4. Stir until the dough clings together.
5. Knead gently on a floured surface for 10 to 12 strokes.
6. Roll or pat to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
7. Cut with 2 1/2-inch biscuit cutters using straight motion.
8. Do not rotate the cutter, as this will cause the biscuits to flatten more than desired.
9. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet for 10 to 12 minutes at 450 degrees F.
